scripts.status: node -e "console.log('JOC is currently in Package Engineering Standards mode. See templates/package-template and engineering/008-package-architecture.md through engineering/016-package-checklist.md.')"
scripts.build: pnpm build:packages && pnpm docs:build && pnpm playground:build
scripts.ci:quality: pnpm workspace:health && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm build && pnpm package:integrity && pnpm release:readiness && pnpm package:blueprint
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const root=process.cwd(); const removeNames=new Set(['dist','build','lib','coverage','.turbo']); const walk=(dir)=>{ for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})) { const full=path.join(dir,entry.name); if (entry.isDirectory()) { if (entry.name === 'node_modules' || entry.name === '.git') continue; if (removeNames.has(entry.name)) { fs.rmSync(full,{recursive:true,force:true}); continue; } walk(full); continue; } if (entry.name.endsWith('.tsbuildinfo')) fs.rmSync(full,{force:true}); } }; walk(root);"
